items.title: Inflation Is Ready to Come Roaring Back
items.description: The effects of tariffs, higher tax returns and even some policies designed to improve affordability could push prices higher.

items.title: Big US banks add $600bn in value as deregulation spurs gains
items.description: America’s six largest banks added $600bn in market value in 2025, spurred on by the Trump administration’s push to deregulate the industry and...

items.title: Is JPMorgan Stock a Buy for 2026 as it Hits an All-Time High?
items.description: JPM stock hits a record high on lower rates, GDP strength and crypto trading talks, even as it trades at a premium. Is it worth betting on for 2026?

items.title: RBC's Gerard Cassidy talks Big Banks hitting record highs
items.description: Gerard Cassidy, RBC Capital Markets managing director, joins 'Closing Bell Overtime' to talk Big Banks hitting record highs on shortened trading day.

items.title: JPMorgan Mulls Entering Crypto Trading Business: What Does This Mean?
items.description: JPM is weighing crypto trading for institutions as regulation eases, signaling a shift that could add liquidity and intensify competition.
